Module 6
Sales Video Mechanics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 10 --

Your Sales Video
▪ 	Rule #1: Your offer (and your sales video) is all about the
TRANSFORMATION… not the “stuff”
▪ 	Rule #2: Refer to Rule #1
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 10 --

Your Sales Video
▪ 	Your video should be as long as it needs to be to tell your complete
story and make your offer and not one second longer!
▪ 	Rough guidelines for Sales Video Timing
▪ 	Beginners: 10-20 minutes
▪ 	Intermediate: up to 35 minutes
▪ 	Expert: up to 40 minutes
▪ 	Uber-Pro: up to 50 minutes
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 10 --

Sales Video Script
▪ 	Opportunity (paint the transformation)
▪ 	Show authority (especially results)
▪ 	Proof and testimonials
▪ 	Foreshadow urgency
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 10 --

Sales Video Script
▪ 	Here’s the deal (make your offer)
▪ 	Features and benefits (Transformational!)
▪ 	Bonuses
▪ 	Price reveal (and price justification)
▪ 	Here’s what to do now
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 10 --

Sales Video Script
▪ 	Urgency (scarcity - why should they act NOW)
▪ 	Call to action (close)
▪ 	Surprise bonus
▪ 	Re-close with scarcity
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 10 --

Sales Video Notes
▪ 	Do NOT assume that your viewer watched your Prelaunch Content
(the sales video needs to be complete)
▪ 	Paint the transformation
▪ 	Before you shoot the video, think about (meditate on) how your
product will transform your prospects life
▪ 	Speak with confidence
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 10 --

Sales Video Notes
▪ 	Look into the camera lens, but don’t stare
▪ 	Don’t talk too fast
▪ 	Don’t slow down intentionally
▪ 	High energy
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 10 --

Sales Video Mechanics
▪ 	Hide the “Buy Now” button until the “call to action”
▪ 	Don’t hide the “Buy Now” button on last day of the launch
▪ 	Test hiding the video controls
▪ 	Scarcity banner near end of launch
▪ 	Pay attention to check out page
▪ 	Sell from power and authority, don’t sell from your heels
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 10 --

Sales Video Script
▪ 	Here’s the deal (make your offer)
▪ 	Features and benefits (Transformational!)
▪ 	Bonuses
▪ 	Price reveal (and price justification)
▪ 	RISK REVERSAL
▪ 	Here’s what to do now
Module 6: Sales Video Mechanics
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
